questions.question: I have a friend ___ I met yesterday. (人・目的格)
questions.explanation: 人が目的語の場合は whom を使います

questions.question: I have a book ___ I bought yesterday. (物・目的格)
questions.explanation: 物が目的語の場合は which を使います

questions.question: I have a pen ___ I use every day. (物・目的格)
questions.explanation: 物が目的語の場合は that を使えます

questions.question: The girl ___ you saw yesterday is my sister. (人・目的格)
questions.explanation: 人が目的語の場合は whom を使います

questions.question: This is the book ___ I was looking for. (物・目的格)
questions.explanation: 物が目的語の場合は which を使います

questions.question: The teacher ___ I respect most is Mr. Smith. (人・目的格)
questions.explanation: 人が目的語の場合は whom を使います

questions.question: The movie ___ we watched was great. (物・目的格)
questions.explanation: 物が目的語の場合は that を使えます

questions.question: 目的格の関係代名詞は省略できる？
questions.explanation: 目的格の関係代名詞は省略可能です
